name: Han Joo Chae
title: CTO & Head of Global Business
tagline: Medical AI leader bridging R&D and global commercialization.
pov: Medical AI only earns its place when it clears the regulators and reaches patients at global scale. I build the teams, products, and go-to-market that get it there.
summary: Medical AI leader with deep expertise bridging R&D with global commercialization across startups and enterprises. I build and scale AI organizations from zero, lead cross-functional teams across Korea and the US, and take products from rapid prototyping to regulated global launch (FDA/CE) — securing $1B+ in contracts and expanding across the US, Asia, the Middle East, and Latin America through partnerships with Google Cloud and AWS.
